name: Sun-Dried Tomato & Basil Pasta Sauce/Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup balsamic vinegar, or red wine vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Insert the steel knife into the food processor.
2. Place basil in a work bowl.
3. With the machine running, drop garlic through the feed tube and mince.
4. Scrape down the sides of the bowl.
5. Add drained sun-dried tomatoes and process until finely chopped, scraping the bowl as needed.
6. Add olive oil, vinegar, salt, sugar, and red pepper flakes.
7. Process until the tomatoes are pureed, about 1 1/2 minutes.
(This sauce can be prepared up to 6 hours ahead. Transfer to a small bowl, cover, and let stand at room temperature. Re-whisk before using if necessary.)
